---
format: 
  pdf:
    fig-align: left
    geometry:
      - a4paper
      - top=40mm
      - left=15mm
      - right=15mm
      - bottom=50mm
    mainfont: Roboto
    mainfontoptions:
      - Color=333333
    sansfont: Roboto-Bold
    sansfontoptions:
      - Color=2E3192
      - Scale=1.1
    fontsize: 12pt
    include-in-header:
      - "../styling/footer.tex"
params:
  is_la_report: false
  school_name: 'Test school academy'
  term: 'Autumn 2024'
execute:
  enabled: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

school_name <- params$school_name
is_la_report <- params$is_la_report
term <- params$term
```


```{r child = 'front-cover.qmd'}
```

```{r child = 'introduction.qmd'}
```
